---
title: "My ceramics journey!"
format: html
categories: [Past ceramics work]
image: ceramics2.png
draft: false
lightbox: true
---


Here is some of my past ceramics work!

## 2023

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](ceramics1.png)

![](ceramics2.png)

![](ceramics3.png)

![](ceramics4.png)

![](ceramics5.png)

![](ceramics6.png)

![](ceramics7.png)

![](ceramics8.png)

![](ceramics9.png)

![](ceramics10.png)
:::
